title: mikania dioica
intro: Mikania dioica, also known as the Indian pennywort or bichu, is a perennial plant native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Mikania dioica include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating various gastrointestinal issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
